name: cryptsetup-initramfs
title: cryptsetup-initramfs
description:
disk encryption support - initramfs integration
Cryptsetup provides an interface for configuring encryption on block
devices (such as /home or swap partitions), using the Linux kernel
device mapper target dm-crypt. It features integrated Linux Unified Key
Setup (LUKS) support.
.
This package provides initramfs integration for cryptsetup.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use cryptsetup-initramfs because disk encryption support - initramfs integration.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use cryptsetup-initramfs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cryptsetup-initramfs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cryptsetup-initramfs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
